image_3deb1232135c60.jpeg.note: 等差數列差分加總推導
image_3deb1232135c60.jpeg.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"\\begin{array}{rcl}a_{n+1}-a_n&=&2n\\\\ \\Rightarrow\\quad a_2-a_1&=&2\\times1\\\\ a_3-a_2&=&2\\times2\\\\ \\vdots&\\vdots&\\\\ {}+)\\quad a_n-a_{n-1}&=&2\\times(n-1)\\\\ \\hline a_n-a_1&=&2[1+2+\\cdots+(n-1)]\\end{array}","note":"等差數列差分加總推導"}
